# MuleSoft Snowflake Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.4) of Snowflake Connector documentation.
> See [Snowflake Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/snowflake-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Snowflake Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Snowflake Connector 1.4](https://docs.mulesoft.com/snowflake-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Snowflake Connector 1.4 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/snowflake-connector/latest/snowflake-connector-examples.md)
- [Configuring FIPS 140-3 for Snowflake Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/snowflake-connector/latest/snowflake-connector-fips-config.md)
- [Snowflake Connector 1.4 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/snowflake-connector/latest/snowflake-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Snowflake Connector 1.4](https://docs.mulesoft.com/snowflake-connector/latest/snowflake-connector-studio.md)
- [Snowflake Connector 1.4 - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/snowflake-connector/latest/snowflake-connector-xml-maven.md)
